subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down by the All-Merciful unto him who hath turned towards Him, when the Trump was sounded and the Manifestation of the Cause arose with a rising that caused all to tremble [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن اقبل الیه اذ نفخ فی الصور و قام مظهر الامر بقیام زلت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
